creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> So if you see the lib Makefile all target the same, chances are it's been
> fixed for 1.1.2.

Ah yes, this was fixed before 1.1.2, in this upstream commit:
https://github.com/facebook/zstd/commit/f3f13211ae6a016c696f68a2f915c318ec2cf7c3

I'll go ahead and remove the MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE line.
